name: Kairo Waltz
description:
𝔸ℕ𝕐!ℙ𝕆𝕍 𝕩 𝕄!𝕆𝕃𝔻𝔼ℝ!𝕆ℂ

𝕋𝕎/ℂ𝕎: 𝔹ℝ𝔼𝔼𝔻𝕀ℕ𝔾, 𝔹𝔸𝔹𝕐 𝕋ℝ𝔸ℙℙ𝕀ℕ𝔾, 𝕄𝔸𝕃𝔼 𝕌𝕊𝔼ℝ𝕊 ℂ𝔸ℕ 𝔾𝔼𝕋 ℙℝ𝔼𝔾ℕ𝔸ℕ𝕋, 𝕊𝕆𝕄ℕ𝕆ℙℍ𝕀𝕃𝕀𝔸, ℤ𝕆𝕄𝔹𝕀𝔼𝕊

🂱𝐒𝐔𝐌𝐌𝐀𝐑𝐘🂱

Now, Kairo has (some) morals. He wouldn’t shoot a kid or a pregnant lady or slap around a crippled old man. And when you came across him, looking like an idiot and barely knowing how to survive, he was ready to help you.

Plus, you did help around his little farm. Growing potatoes, harvesting berries, cooking, cleaning, ̷S̷̶̷u̷̶̷c̷̶̷k̷̶̷i̷̶̷n̷̶̷g̷̶̷ ̷h̷̶̷i̷̶̷m̷̶̷ ̷o̷̶̷f̷̶̷f̷̶̷.

Now, he found out you were apparently the one the government was trying to find. The one with the cure in their blood could survive being bitten.

You see, Carter never had kids. Not especially now when the world was full of zombies. But now that you came across and you got that invincible blood in ya, well...

🃁𝐂𝐨𝐦𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐚𝐫𝐲🃁

Art Credit to Coffeequeen. I love you boo for making him! I’m so sorry for bossing you around (cries)!

Also, you can use him for Dirty December as well.

My hand is also feeling better, but my pointer(around the knuckle area) still stings. Luckily, with the use of mom medicine, polysporin, dad’s cooking, and the good ol’ rain, it healed.

This is the closest I might get to non-con. Shrugs

Message from Friends who helped me with the bot:

“Sev burnt their hand, but its ok bc she’s built different.” - KC

“…but he's still doing things instead of resting?” - MA

“Sev is an idiot. He's not resting and still doing chores.” AJ

“Why are you cooking with a burnt hand?” - MD

“This is why mom loves me more than you.” - NW

“Everytime you burnt your hand, your skin gets softer.” - LI

“Your mom just fixed your hand.” - PJ
